scripts.api:test: sh -c 'if [ -d apps/api ]; then cd apps/api && npm test; else echo "apps/api will be added in Task 2"; fi'
scripts.api:deploy: sh -c 'if [ -d apps/api ]; then cd apps/api && npx wrangler deploy; else echo "apps/api will be added in Task 2"; fi'
scripts.check: npm run mobile:analyze && npm run mobile:test
